PLANTED POSITIVE CONTROL — do not treat as clean. This file deliberately carries a
SYNTHETIC owner-specific-shaped identifier and a transcript-shaped line so the
no-secrets detector in lib/test/test_create_issue_context_eval.py is proven to FIRE
on the shape it guards (not merely to pass on a clean tree). The path below is
synthetic (no real owner id — CLAUDE.md forbids those in committed files) yet still
matches the detector patterns. It is excluded by name from the clean scan.

owner path: /Users/exampleuser/repos/example
transcript dir: -Users-exampleuser-repos-example
{"type":"assistant","attributionSkill":"devflow:create-issue","message":{"usage":{"input_tokens":123}}}
